explanation: The property states that immediately after the system successfully completes its start-up procedure, the user must select either 'New Patient' or 'Resume Ventilation' at some point before the system transitions into 'SelfTest Mode'.
decision1_substring: Once the start-up has been completed successfully
decision3_substring: the user must select “New Patient” or “Resume Ventilation” before the system transitions to self-test mode
output_structured_natural_language: upon startUpDone, before SelfTestMode, satisfy newPatient | resumeVentilation
